setup.installHint: Install the {{cli}} CLI on your machine. Houston will pick it up automatically.
setup.waiting: Waiting for the sign-in to finish in your browser...

claudeInstall.preparing: Houston is downloading Claude Code in the background. If it doesn't start, try again below.

errors.timeout: The download took too long. Check your internet connection and try again.
errors.networkUnreachable: Couldn't reach Anthropic. Check your internet connection and try again.
errors.downloadInterrupted: The download was interrupted. Check your internet connection and try again.
errors.httpError: Anthropic's servers had a problem (error {{status}}). Try again in a few minutes.
errors.checksumMismatch: The download didn't arrive intact. Check your connection and try again.
errors.platformUnsupported: Claude Code isn't available for this device yet.
errors.writeFailed: Houston couldn't save Claude Code to your computer. Make sure there's enough space and try again.
errors.unavailable: Houston couldn't start the download. Try again in a moment.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong while downloading Claude Code. Try again.

signOutConfirm.title: Sign out of {{provider}}?
signOutConfirm.description: Houston will stop using {{provider}} until you sign in again. Existing missions can still finish their current turn.

providerLogin.title: Finish signing in to {{name}}
providerLogin.description: Open the sign-in page in your browser, complete sign-in, then paste the verification code back here.
providerLogin.codePlaceholder: Paste the code from your browser
providerLogin.deviceDescription: Open the link below, sign in, then enter this one-time code to finish.
providerLogin.deviceCodeHint: Enter this code on the {{name}} page after you sign in.
providerLogin.deviceWaiting: Waiting for you to authorize in your browser...

geminiConnect.title: Connect {{name}}
geminiConnect.description: Sign in with your Google account to use the free Gemini tier, the same one the gemini CLI uses outside Houston.
geminiConnect.signInRecommended: Recommended. Uses the free personal tier, no payment required.
